comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: This module is still in development. We're working to bring it live soon. Meanwhile you can continue with customer, contract and document management.

tariffs.intro: Parametric tariffs per insurance company, branch and insured object — with automatic premium calculation and one-click proposal/policy issuance.
bullets: Multiple tariffs per company, usage and term
Pricing recipes with age, zone and discount factors
Automatic tariff selection from customer answers
Issue Cover Note or full policy in one click

coverNotes.intro: Instant temporary cover notes from quotes, with auto-fill of customer and insured object details.
bullets: Print/PDF cover note from the proposal screen
Numbering, validity, auto-expiry and conversion to a full policy
Send to customer or partner by email

branchDesigner.intro: Design new insurance branches without development — define objects, coverages, questionnaire, pricing and issuance flow yourself.
bullets: Custom fields per branch (Auto, Boat, Solar, Drones…)
Coverages, packages and options with commission factors
Your own questionnaire for online issuance

deliveryTracking.intro: Track contract delivery to customers, with auto-classification and reminders for those not yet received.

appointments.intro: Calendar and appointments with customers/partners in day/week/month view — shared, with reminders and Google/Outlook sync.
bullets: Drag & drop appointments per employee and room
Link appointments to requests and contracts

documentManager.intro: Central document management per customer, contract, claim and employee — with tagging, full-text search and version control.
bullets: OCR and full-text search across PDFs/images

marketing.intro: Mass email campaigns to customer segments with automatic audience selection (expiries, birthdays, new branches) and customer card updates after send.
bullets: Auto-log communication on the customer card

b2bPortal.intro: B2B and C2B portals for partners and customers — issue contracts, track activity and self-serve through the web.
bullets: Branded login for partners using credentials you issue

commissions.intro: Parametric commissions by Partner × Insured Object × Coverage, with annual changes that preserve history.
bullets: Commission tables per partner / branch / coverage
Different rate for annual premium increases

overCommissions.intro: Up to 9-level over-commission pyramid — automatic calculation and settlement for agents, managers and teams.
bullets: Your own rates per level and branch

productionStats.intro: Detailed production statistics per partner, company, branch, year — with charts and export.

goals.intro: Production goals and retention rates — with live scoring per partner and team.
bullets: Live progress bars on the dashboard
Retention rate per partner and company

financials.intro: Financial movements per contract: customer charges, partner charges, company credits, commissions and over-commissions — all wired together.

receipts.intro: Receipt circuit with multiple payment methods (cash, card, deposit, securities) and automatic balance closing.
bullets: Partial or full receipt with mixed methods

payments.intro: Payments to companies and partners with commission netting (mixed-minus-commissions) and full traceability.
bullets: Pay partners with and without over-commission

securities.intro: Manage securities (cheques, promissory notes) with maturity tracking and automatic commission delivery to partners on payment.

dias.intro: DIAS interbank integration for premium collection with RF code; automatic policy delivery the moment your office receives payment confirmation.
bullets: RF / bill payment codes per contract

bankConnections.intro: Connections to bank accounts (Open Banking / extracted statements) for automatic identification of deposits and customer card updates.
bullets: Open Banking sync or statement upload

thirdParty.intro: Communication with external apps — production import, partner agencies, reinsurers and custom APIs.

accounting.intro: Direct integration with accounting systems (BlueByte or third-party). Generate accounting entries from every financial movement.

kepyo.intro: KEPYO (customer/supplier summary statements) updates in one click, auto-filled from the year's data.

financialPrintouts.intro: Ledgers, journals and trial balances — complete financial printouts with filters and export to PDF/Excel.

magneticImport.intro: Import production/receipts from magnetic media (insurer files) with auto-matching to contracts.

customerDashboard.subtitle: All your contracts, documents and notifications in one place. Your agency keeps them up to date for you.

cta.title: Need something from your agency?
cta.subtitle: Send a request, report an accident or ask for a document — your agency team will reply.

contractDetails.noDocuments: Your agency hasn't uploaded documents yet.

wizard.title: New Contract
wizard.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll send it to your agency to process.

step1.title: What do you want to insure?

step2.title: Details for {{type}}
step2.subtitle: Fill in what you can. We can complete missing fields together by phone.

step3.title: Confirm your request
step3.subtitle: Make sure everything is right, then submit to your agency.

wizard.notesHelp: Anything else you find useful (quote code, old policy, etc).
wizard.submitInfo: On submit, the request is sent to your agency. They will contact you with a quote.

errors.pickType: Pick what you want to insure.

success.title: We received your request!
success.body: Your agency will process it and reach out with a quote shortly.

other.details: Describe what you want to insure *
other.help: Tell us about the item you want to insure.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details and account security.

tutorial.title: Onboarding Tour
tutorial.body: Re-watch the initial tour shown on your first login.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Agency-wide tasks. Manage status, priority and assignment.

producers.title: Producers
producers.subtitle: Manage your agency's producers and production partners.
producers.portalCreatedBody: Hand the producer these credentials so they can sign in to the platform:

producerDashboard.noExpiring: No policies expire in the next 30 days.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Real-time agency summary — straight from your existing data.

agencySettings.title: Agency settings
agencySettings.subtitle: Identity, contact info and defaults that apply across the agency.
agencySettings.name: Trade name
agencySettings.logoHelp: PNG, JPEG, SVG or WebP, up to 4 MB. Shown in the navbar for your agency's admin, employees and customers.
agencySettings.logoTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 4 MB.
agencySettings.durationHelp: How many months are pre-filled when creating a new policy.

v2.heroAction: Sign in or get started today.
v2.heroSub: A single environment for every insurance agency — carrier bridges, production, cash, digital client portal. All connected.
v2.featuresSub: One unified platform — from contract management and cash, to client marketing, quote generation, analytics, and bridges to insurers and banks.

feat.bridgesB: Automatic policy import from every insurer in your agency's portfolio, with smart detection of cancellations, renewals and endorsements. Excel and CSV batches are de-duplicated, mapped to existing customers and producers, and pushed straight into your commissions ledger, cash tables and production KPIs — no manual data entry, from day one.
feat.prodB: Filters by carrier, producer, branch. Export to Excel and PDF with automatic subtotals.
feat.networkB: A/B/C/D/E tiering with different commissions per tier — fully parametric.
feat.cashB: Receipts and payments in real time, with commission netting.
feat.accessB: Per-user, per-role, per-branch permissions. Full access audit log.
feat.portalB: Mobile app for clients and a web portal for producers, wired into the back-office.

desktop.title: Your platform, now outside the browser.
desktop.subA: Native Windows and macOS app that runs locally on your machine and syncs with the Kalypsis cloud. Same data, same access controls — but with desktop-class speed and full functionality when your connection drops.
desktop.subB: Designed for offices with heavy data-entry: keyboard-first workflows, shortcuts for every action, thermal-printer support and direct access to local PDF/XLSX files without uploads.

slides.s1B: Full receipts and payments ledger with instant search, bulk actions, payment-method filters and Excel / PDF exports.
slides.s2B: Details, policies, communication history, bulk SMS/Email — all on one screen with direct access to claims and payments.
slides.s3B: Live production and settlement dashboards, line distribution, top producers and commission breakdown by month, carrier and partner.
slides.s4B: Powerful KPIs, smart filters and one-click Excel export — a full picture of the year in seconds, no browser required.

faq.a1: Yes. The app keeps a local encrypted copy of your office data and syncs automatically when the connection returns. Entry, search and printing all work offline.
faq.q2: Is it a separate program or a browser extension?
faq.a2: A full native app with .msi installers for Windows and .dmg for macOS. No browser required to run, no extra plugins.
faq.a3: Two-way sync in real time over an encrypted channel (TLS 1.3). Desktop changes show up in Kalypsis web instantly — and vice-versa.
faq.a4: No. It's included in your subscription at no additional cost. Each user can install it on up to 3 devices.
faq.a5: Windows 10/11 (x64), macOS 12+ (Intel & Apple Silicon). Linux is on the 2026 roadmap.

v2.newsBody: New features, guides and platform announcements. No spam. Unsubscribe in one click.
v2.newsError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
v2.newsSuccess: Thank you! You'll be the first to hear our updates.

editorial.heroPlate: Up and running in under 5 days, out of Excel, in Greek — with your data migrated for you.
editorial.byBody: A platform for Greek insurance agencies and intermediaries. Designed with attention to detail.
editorial.agentMarginalia: From the independent broker serving 60 customers to the brokerage with a 200-person network. Same system, different scale.

manifesto.title: One office, one system. Not seven different tools.
manifesto.body: We built Kalypsis around how a Greek insurance office actually works — small or large, with or without partners, in Athens or in the regions. Policies, renewals, receipts, commissions and customer communication. Same page, same interface, in Greek.

pullQuote.text: We stopped being afraid of our inbox. Kalypsis reminded us our job is to serve people — not fill in spreadsheets.
pullQuote.author: PAPADAKIS INSURANCE

showcase.title: See Kalypsis in motion.
showcase.lead: Five of the most important screens — customers, policies, multi-carrier quoting, commissions, reports. Click a tab to see what each looks like.

descs.customers: Your whole portfolio on one screen: contact details, tax ID, active policies, customer value and communication history. Filter by type, age and location.
descs.policies: Policy management with clear status, early-warning colours for expiry and renewal, and one-click hand-off to the carrier's electronic issuance.
descs.quotes: Quote every carrier in parallel. Comparative view sorted by premium, send to the customer by email with one click.
descs.commissions: Production, commissions and over-commissions across every level of the network, with bank-statement reconciliation and automatic settlement.
descs.reports: Drag the fields you care about and build your own report. Export to Excel or PDF, schedule email delivery.

landing.headline: Your entire insurance agency. In one platform.
landing.lead: From issuing a policy to renewal reminders and commission settlement, Kalypsis keeps your office organised and your customers informed — in Greek, by the rules of the Greek market.

features.title: Everything a modern agency needs
features.lead: Stop juggling Excel, email and phone reminders. Kalypsis handles the lot.

policies.title: Policy Management
policies.body: Motor, home, life, health, business — all lines in one view with history, renewals and documents.

renewals.title: Smart Reminders
renewals.body: Automatic 30/15/7-day renewal alerts for customers and staff. No expired policy ever again.

portal.title: Customer Portal
portal.body: Customers see their policies and documents without calling you. Fewer calls, happier clients.

commissions.title: Commissions & Production
commissions.body: Track production per producer, carrier and line. No more spreadsheet errors at settlement.

mobile.title: Mobile-first design
mobile.body: Works beautifully on phone and tablet. Onboard a customer right on the metro.

integrations.title: Integration-ready
integrations.body: APIs for e-Parabolo, the Tax Office, insurance carriers, accounting and SMS providers.

forAgencies.title: One office. Many branches. Zero chaos.
forAgencies.lead: Whether you're solo or running a 30-person team with branches across Athens and the regions, Kalypsis keeps everyone aligned.
forAgencies.badge: Hosted in a European data centre
forAgencies.point1: Multiple branches with separate staff and permissions.
forAgencies.point2: One-click customer onboarding with auto-created portal account.
forAgencies.point3: Full audit trail of every policy change.
forAgencies.point4: Production reports per employee, line and carrier.
forAgencies.point5: Free team training and data migration from your previous system.

forAgents.title: Work freely. Track professionally.
forAgents.lead: For insurance agents, coordinators, consultants and brokers who want real-time visibility into their production and zero missed commissions.

pricing.title: Pick the plan that fits you
pricing.lead: Every plan includes a 14-day free trial, no card required. Cancel any time.
pricing.unified: Same plans for agencies and individual brokers — pick by users and customers, not by who you are.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For people getting started: solo licence or a two-person team.

pro.name: Professional
pro.tagline: For growing operations: teams up to 15 with full production tools.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.tagline: For scaling operations: unlimited team, custom integrations and SLA.
enterprise.f6: Your own server or private cloud

q1.q: How long does it take to go live?
q1.a: From signing to full operation, our average setup time is 5 working days — including importing data from Excel or another system.

q2.q: Can I import customers from my old system?
q2.a: Yes. We support imports from Excel, CSV and from the older specialised Greek market software. Migration is free on Professional and Enterprise.

q3.q: How is my customers' data protected?
q3.a: All data is hosted in the EU with AES-256 encryption. No agency sees another's data thanks to our multi-tenant architecture.

q4.a: Yes — everything is available on phone and tablet, no app needed. Just open the browser.

q5.q: What happens if I want to leave?
q5.a: You can export all your data to CSV at any time and cancel your subscription without penalties.

finalCta.title: Ready to modernise your agency?
finalCta.lead: 14-day free trial, no card required. We migrate your data for you.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link to reset it.
forgot.emailHelp: Enter your account email. The link is valid for 1 hour.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.

errors.noToken: Invalid link. Please request a new one.
errors.short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage platform-wide parameters: email sending and base addresses.
settings.supportEmailHelp: Shown in user-facing emails as the contact address.
settings.appBaseUrlHelp: Used to build links in emails (e.g. password reset).

brevo.title: Brevo (email sending)
brevo.subtitle: Brevo API credentials for transactional email (password reset, notifications).
brevo.apiKeyHelp: Leave blank to keep the current key. Create a new one from Brevo › SMTP & API.

test.title: Send a test email
test.subtitle: Send a test email to verify your Brevo settings are correct.

settings.testFailGeneric: Send failed. Check your Brevo settings.

pricing.footnote: Need custom volume or special requirements? We're here.

editorial.marginalia: Every plan includes free data migration from your old system and 2 hours of team training. Cancel anytime, no penalties.

hero.lead: Build your own Kalypsis. Take only the pieces you need today. Add the rest when you're ready.

intro.title: A package model. Not «small, medium, large».
intro.body1: Kalypsis is one unified system made of five independent packages. Each agency pays for — and sees in their menu — only the packages that fit them today. The platform admin enables or disables any package at any time, with zero downtime.
intro.body2: We don't force you to buy features you don't need. We don't push «upgrades» just to unlock a button. You get what you actually use, with the freedom to add or drop a package whenever your operations change.

packages.title: Five distinct platforms, fused into one.
packages.label: PACKAGE

backoffice.name: BackOffice — Your back-office ledger
backoffice.body: The core of your agency: digital customer file, carrier catalog, network producers, manual or automated policy registration. Cashier, payments, commission management with over-commissions, bank-statement reconciliation, accounting exports for your bookkeeper. Bridges to legacy back-office systems (BlueByte, ALIS, OneSoft) for smooth migration.
backoffice.example: An agency currently using ALIS Insurance as its accounting base can replace just that, while keeping their existing carrier-portal policy issuance flow untouched.

frontoffice.name: FrontOffice — Your online carrier interface
frontoffice.body: Your window to every carrier. Quote every insurer in parallel, save risk profiles by plate or tax-ID, file applications and issue policies on the spot, manage plafond regimes (Print-Pay, Pay-Print, Piggy Bank). Send orders to the manager for carriers that don't yet support direct issuance.
frontoffice.example: An agency currently using WebInsurer for quoting can switch to FrontOffice and keep their existing back-office program running in parallel.

crm.name: CRM & Customer Portal — The customer experience
crm.body: Your customer lives inside your app. Customer portal and mobile app for iOS and Android, requests and pending items, appointments, automatic renewal reminders via email/SMS/Viber, document management and digital signatures. Marketing campaigns and bulk outreach, GDPR consent archive.
crm.example: An agency that wants its customers to see their policies and file requests from their phones — without having to call the office.

intelligence.name: Reports & Intelligence — Your business view
intelligence.body: Production tracking with goals per partner and branch. Drag-and-drop report builder with scheduled email delivery, Excel or PDF export. AI policy-PDF extraction, AI churn prediction, AI communication drafting. Audit logs for every user action and complete change history.
intelligence.example: An agency that wants a weekly production report in their Saturday inbox, with per-producer charts and a list of customers likely to renew elsewhere.

integrations.name: Integrations & Compliance — The Greek ecosystem
integrations.body: The whole Greek operating environment built in. myDATA submission to the Independent Authority, e-invoicing, online payments through bank e-POS terminals, ePay, DIAS and Viva Wallet. VoIP telephony with call recording and automatic Greek transcription. Gmail/Outlook IMAP sync, multi-branch operations, B2B partner portal.
integrations.example: An agency with branches across multiple cities that wants automatic myDATA submission, card payments from customers, and a call center with a recorded archive.

combos.title: Mix and match however you want.
combos.lead: There's no «right» combination — only the one that solves your specific problems. Below are the common patterns we see in the market.

onlyBackoffice.title: BackOffice only
onlyBackoffice.body: For agencies currently using a local back-office program (ALIS, BlueByte, OneSoft) that want to replace it, while keeping their existing carrier-portal issuance flow as-is. Complete customer, policy, cashier and commission management.

backFront.title: BackOffice + FrontOffice
backFront.body: The classic «full» install: simultaneously replaces a back-office (ALIS-style) and a front-office (WebInsurer-style). Quoting + issuance + accounting, all in one app.

backFrontCrm.title: BackOffice + FrontOffice + CRM
backFrontCrm.body: All of the above plus the customer experience: customer portal, mobile app, automatic renewal alerts, marketing campaigns and digital signatures. Ideal for agencies wanting to cut down inbound phone calls.

all.packages: PACKAGES I + II + III + IV + V
all.title: All five
all.body: The complete platform: operations, experience, intelligence and compliance in one. AI, custom reports, myDATA, online payments, call centre. The whole agency in a single window.

custom.title: Any other combination you want
custom.body: E.g. BackOffice + Intelligence for an insurance accountant with no need for policy issuance. FrontOffice + CRM for an agency with its own accounting and wants only issuance and customer side. Tell us what you need and we'll suggest the right mix.

contact.title: Not sure which package fits you?
contact.lead: Tell us how your agency works today. We'll recommend the combination that solves the largest share of your pain with the smallest package.

requests.customerLead: Send a request to your agency: new policy, accident report, document request or general question.
requests.agencyLead: Queue of requests from all of your customers. Update status, assign to an employee, leave notes.

create.title: New request
create.subtitle: Tell us what you need. After submission you'll be able to attach files (photos, documents).
create.subject: Subject
create.otherPartyHelp: Name, phone, plate number of the other vehicle.
create.attachmentsAfterCreate: Once created, you can attach files like photos or your driving licence.

documents.agencyLead: All documents attached to your agency's policies.
documents.customerLead: All documents from your policies — available to download.

errors.required: Pick a policy and a file.

claims.agencyLead: All claim filings handled by your agency — pending, under review, approved or paid.
claims.customerLead: History of your own claim filings, with their current status.

form.descriptionHelp: Describe the circumstances, injuries and damage.

policies.agencyLead: All policies for your agency. Create, renew, cancel.
policies.customerLead: All active and previous policies, kept up to date by your agency.

form.customerLocked: Customer can't be changed after creation.

renew.title: Renew policy
renew.body: A new policy will be created from {{num}}. The original will be marked as Renewed.

allUsers.title: All Users
allUsers.subtitle: Manage every user across every agency on the platform.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: All activity records across the platform: creates, updates and deletes.

register.headline: One application. Everyone welcome.
register.lead: Whether you're an insurance agency, an intermediary or an independent broker, fill in the same simple form. Our team will reach out within one business day and activate your account with the right setup.
register.formLead: Tell us about yourself. The professional fields are optional — we ask for them so we can give you the right role from day one.
register.professionalHelp: Fill in whatever applies. If you're an agency, give us the company name and VAT. If you hold an individual licence, give us the registration number. Leave blank if none applies.
register.organizationHelp: If you're registering as an agency.
register.licenseNumberHelp: If you have an individual or agency licence.
register.messageHelp: A short description of your activity, team size and what you want from the platform. So we're prepared when we call you.

agency.title: Agency details
agency.lead: Fill in the details below to activate your agency. Our team will contact you within one business day.
agency.licenseHelp: e.g. registration number from the chamber
agency.partnersHelp: List the key carriers you already partner with.

agent.title: Individual licence details
agent.lead: Enter the details of your individual chamber licence. All data is protected under GDPR.
agent.licenseNumberHelp: As shown on your chamber registration

errors.name: Please enter first and last name.
errors.legalName: Please enter the legal company name.
errors.contactName: Please enter first and last name.
errors.address: Please enter the full registered address.
errors.license: Please enter the licence registration number.
errors.terms: You must accept the terms to continue.

register.terms: I confirm the above is accurate and accept the Kalypsis <0>Privacy Policy</0> and <1>Terms of Service</1>. I consent to the Kalypsis team contacting me to verify these details.

success.title: We've received your application!
success.body: Our team will contact you within one business day to verify your details and activate your account.

registrations.title: Registration Requests
registrations.subtitle: Every submission from the public /register form, with full contact details and review status.
registrations.searchPlaceholder: Search name, email, VAT, agency or reference…
registrations.empty: No requests match the current filters.

detail.title: Application details
detail.reviewNotesHelp: Internal notes only. Not sent to the applicant.

approve.title: Approve & create account
approve.lead: Set a temporary password for the new user. Approving will create a tenant and an AgencyAdmin user with these credentials and send a welcome email.
approve.passwordHelp: At least 8 characters. The user can change it after first login.
approve.sendWelcomeEmailHelp: The email contains the sign-in email, temporary password, and tenant code.
approve.alreadyApproved: This request has already been approved.

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters and match the confirmation.

success.title: Account created for {{name}}.
success.emailSent: Welcome email with the credentials has been sent.
success.emailFailed: Account was created but the welcome email failed: {{error}}. Send the credentials manually.
success.emailSkipped: No email was sent. Share the credentials with the user manually.

billing.title: Tenant billing
billing.subtitle: Set a price per package for each tenant. Numbers stream live from active grants.
billing.empty: No tenants on the platform yet.

errors.invalidPrice: Price must be a non-negative number.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: View, generate and email monthly invoices to tenants.
invoices.empty: No invoices match the current filters.

generateDialog.title: Generate month
generateDialog.lead: Creates one invoice per tenant with priced active packages for the selected period. Tenants without priced packages are skipped.
generateDialog.vatRateHelp: E.g. 24 for 24% VAT. Use 0 for no VAT.

detail.title: Invoice details
detail.overrideEmailPlaceholder: e.g. accounting@agency.gr — leave empty to use the tenant's email
detail.confirmDelete: Delete this invoice? This cannot be undone.

hub.lead: Pick a workspace. Each package has its own environment — your data stays unified across the whole app.
hub.footnote: Customers, policies and documents stay shared and are reachable from any workspace.

BackOffice.name: BackOffice — Ledger
BackOffice.body: Cashier, payments, commissions, over-commissions, accounting exports. Manual or bridged data entry.

FrontOffice.name: FrontOffice — Production
FrontOffice.body: Quote every carrier in parallel, saved risk profiles, Print-Pay, Pay-Print, Piggy Bank.

Crm.name: CRM & Customer Portal
Crm.body: Customer portal, mobile app, requests, appointments, marketing, bulk Email/SMS/Viber.

Intelligence.name: Reports & Intelligence
Intelligence.body: Production goals, report builder, AI churn prediction, AI drafting, audit logs.

Integrations.name: Integrations & Compliance
Integrations.body: myDATA, online payments, telephony, branches, B2B portal, external bridges.

economics.title: Platform Economics
economics.subtitle: Total revenue, new agencies, churn, and per-agency contribution.

chart.title: MRR by month
chart.subtitle: Aggregated monthly revenue across all agencies.

premium.title: Premium
premium.body: Total policy premium for the full term, VAT-inclusive when applicable.

endDate.title: End date
endDate.body: Date the coverage ends. Typically 12 months after start.

carrier.title: Insurance carrier
carrier.body: The company that issues the policy and underwrites the risk.

producer.title: Producer
producer.body: The agent/producer who wrote the policy and earns the commission.

specsJson.title: Risk specs
specsJson.body: Type-specific fields: plate/year for auto, sqm/floor for home, etc.

type.title: Endorsement type
type.body: Add/remove coverage, change data, partial cancel, premium adjustment, beneficiary or insured-object change.

premiumDelta.title: Premium delta
premiumDelta.body: Positive = additional charge. Negative = refund. Applied to the parent policy when the endorsement is issued.

effectiveFrom.title: Effective from
effectiveFrom.body: Date the endorsement starts. Usually within the parent policy's active term.

refundMethod.title: Refund method
refundMethod.body: Pro Rata = remaining days · Short Rate = pro rata with 20% penalty · Full = entire premium · Custom = manual amount.

effectiveFrom.title: Cancellation effective
effectiveFrom.body: Date coverage stops. Drives the pro-rata refund calc.

kind.title: Credit note kind
kind.body: Cancellation refund, premium decrease from endorsement, commission adjustment, or manual.

bulkOperation.title: Bulk operation
bulkOperation.body: SetPercentage = % of premium · SetFixed = fixed amount on all · MultiplyBy = multiply current · AddFixed = add fixed to current.

withholding.title: Withholding %
withholding.body: Tax withheld from commission. In Greece typically 20%.

vatNumber.title: Tax ID (ΑΦΜ)
vatNumber.body: 9-digit Greek tax ID. Required for legal entities and professionals.

amka.title: Social Security #
amka.body: 11-digit Greek social security number. Needed for Health/Life policies.

category.title: Customer category
category.body: Configure categories (VIP, Business, New) from Settings > Catalogs.

isHq.title: Headquarters
isHq.body: One per agency. The HQ is included in the base subscription at no extra cost.

surcharge.title: Per-extra-office charge
surcharge.body: Monthly surcharge for each active office beyond what the base subscription includes.

general.title: Workspace
general.body: Each package has its own sidebar with the relevant pages. Click HUB at the top bar to return to the main screen and choose another.

general.title: Feature package
general.body: Each package unlocks a discrete set of pages and actions. The platform admin enables them per agency.

customers.title: Customers
customers.body: Individuals and businesses you insure. Per-customer record with policies, requests, claims, documents, GDPR consents and communications.

policies.title: Policies
policies.body: All policies your agency manages regardless of status. View details, documents, claims, commissions and endorsements from here.

producers.title: Producers
producers.body: Affiliated agents or sub-agencies that produce on your behalf. Manage profile, code, status, and commission/over-commission calculations.

claims.title: Claims
claims.body: Register and track claims per policy. Reported → Investigating → Settled → Closed. Auto-links to policy and customer.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body: Internal agency tasks with due date, priority and staff assignment. Optionally link to a policy or customer.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: Every digital file your agency holds — contracts, policy PDFs, receipts, customer IDs. Tag-based organization with full-text search.

requests.title: Customer requests
requests.body: Requests submitted by customers via portal or office. New policy, accident report, document request, general question.

receipts.title: Payment receipts
receipts.body: Premium collections from customers. Linked to policies and feed the commission calculation.

payments.title: Payments out
payments.body: Disbursements to insurance carriers, producers or third parties. Linked to commissions and cash flow.

tariffs.title: Tariffs
tariffs.body: Standing rate catalogs per product/carrier/period. Feed quote sheets and new-business issuance.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.body: Meetings with customers or producers — reminders, location, link to customer/policy.

users.title: Agency users
users.body: Admin, staff, producers with login access. Configure roles, permissions, 2FA and active state.

tenants.title: Platform tenants
tenants.body: All insurance agencies on Kalypsis. Impersonate, view contract, financials, packages per tenant.

audit.title: Audit logs
audit.body: Complete history of user actions on the platform. Who did what, when, with IP/device. Tamper-proof.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.body: Brevo email credentials, app base URL, support contacts. Affect the entire platform.

endorsements.title: Endorsements
endorsements.body: Mid-term modifications — add/remove coverage, change data, re-rate, partial cancel.

cancellations.title: Policy cancellations
cancellations.body: End policy with refund calc (pro rata / short rate / full / custom) and auto-issued credit note.

creditNotes.title: Credit notes
creditNotes.body: Refunds to customers/carriers. Auto-issued from cancellations/endorsements or created manually.

bulkCommissions.title: Bulk commission editor
bulkCommissions.body: Filter policies + rule → preview → apply en masse. Solves the hour-by-hour single-policy fix grind.

lookups.title: Reference catalogs
lookups.body: Reference tables that feed dropdowns — banks, tax offices, categories, cancellation reasons, legal forms, cities, occupations.

newContract.title: New contract
newContract.body: 4-step wizard to create a new policy: customer → carrier + product → risk details → review and issue.

groupPolicies.title: Group policies
groupPolicies.body: One master policy covering many members (e.g. company employees). Header carries premium and duration; members enrol individually.

garages.title: Garages
garages.body: Approved repair shop directory used by claim referrals. Garages can receive indemnity payouts directly when repairing a customer's vehicle.

provisions.title: Claim provisions
provisions.body: Accounting reserves — estimated payout per claim. IBNR = incurred but not reported losses, an estimate of claims that happened but were not yet declared.

indemnities.title: Indemnities
indemnities.body: Payouts to claimants, hospitals or garages. Linked to a claim. When the payee is a garage, pick it from the directory.

gl.title: General ledger
gl.body: Double-entry bookkeeping — every entry debits and credits accounts. Produces trial balance, P&L and account detail.

cash.title: Cash position
cash.body: Cashboxes (office cash drawer, representative cash). Every receipt or payment movement updates the running balance in real-time.

nameDays.title: Name-days
nameDays.body: Shows which customers celebrate today — one click to call them or email good wishes, strengthening the relationship.

mydata.title: myDATA submissions
mydata.body: History of invoice/receipt transmissions to the Greek tax authority (AADE). Records the MARK and UID AADE returns, plus any errors.

docDesigner.title: Document designer
docDesigner.body: Two tabs: Templates (HTML print templates per document kind with header/body/footer) and Numbering (prefix + padding + suffix per document kind).

customerNumber.title: Customer number
customerNumber.body: Unique customer code in your system. Auto-generated if not provided.

customerType.title: Customer type
customerType.body: Individual = personal, Company = business. Changes the available fields (VAT/Tax Office vs SSN/ID).

claimStatus.title: Claim status
claimStatus.body: Reported → Investigating → Approved/Rejected → Settled/Closed. State change writes timestamps used by reports.

claimAmount.title: Estimated/payable amount
claimAmount.body: Estimated: first assessor estimate. Payable: final amount after carrier approval.

taskPriority.title: Priority
taskPriority.body: Low → Normal → High → Urgent. Affects list order and overdue reports.

taskDueDate.title: Due date
taskDueDate.body: Date by which the task must be completed. When passed without completion, the task becomes overdue (red).

receiptAmount.title: Collected amount
receiptAmount.body: Exact amount received from the customer — either an installment or the full premium.

paymentBeneficiary.title: Payment beneficiary
paymentBeneficiary.body: Who the money goes to — Insurance carrier, Producer, or Third party (e.g., lawyer, assessor).

userImpersonation.loginAsConfirm: Log in as {{name}} ({{email}})? This action is recorded in the audit log.
userImpersonation.tooltip: Log in as this user (30-min session)

packageLocked.title: This feature is locked
packageLocked.lead: The feature you requested belongs to the «{{package}}» package, which isn't currently active for your agency. Contact our team to enable it.

footer.intro: Kalypsis is a modern Greek insurance management platform, designed around the needs of the Greek broker and the requirements of EU regulation.
footer.compliance: Compliant with Law 4583/2018 (IDD), GDPR and the supervision of the Bank of Greece.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: New features, best-practice guides and market updates — straight to your inbox. No spam, one-click unsubscribe.
newsletter.failed: We couldn't complete your subscription. Please try again later.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

faq.title: Everything you might be wondering
faq.lead: We collected the most common questions about the platform, pricing, security and support.

notFound.title: Didn't find what you needed?
notFound.body: Our team replies within one business day. Drop us a line and we'll get back to you.

f1.a: An end-to-end Greek SaaS platform for insurance agencies, intermediaries and brokers. One system unifies CRM, contract issuance and tracking, receipts, commission calculation, marketing and integration with insurance carriers, banks (DIAS) and third-party apps.

f2.a: From small specialised one-user agencies to networks with dozens of partners, to multi-carrier brokers and partner networks with up to 9-level over-commission pyramids.

f3.q: Do I need to install anything?
f3.a: No. Kalypsis is 100% cloud — works from any browser on desktop, tablet or phone. No install, no updates, no IT department needed.

f4.a: Yes. Greek is the primary language but every page has a toggle for English — useful when your agency serves international customers.

p1.a: Three plans: Basic, Professional and Enterprise. See the Pricing page for details. All plans include a 14-day free trial with no card required.

p2.a: Yes — 14 days on every plan. We don't ask for payment details to start, just an email and your agency name.

p3.q: How many users does each plan include?
p3.a: Basic: 3 users. Professional: 10. Enterprise: unlimited. You can add extra seats above the limit with a small monthly surcharge.

p4.a: Yes, anytime, no cancellation fees. Your data stays available for export 60 days after cancellation.

d1.q: Can I import customers from my old system?
d1.a: Yes. We support Excel, CSV and direct migration from the most common Greek market systems. Migration is free on Professional and Enterprise.

d2.a: In an EU data centre (Frankfurt), with AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Daily automated backups with 30-day retention.

d3.a: Anytime. Every list (customers, contracts, receipts, financial movements) has an Excel/CSV export button. Full JSON backup is also supported.

s1.a: Multi-tenant architecture with strict database-level isolation — no agency sees another's data. JWT auth, BCrypt for passwords, SHA-256 for tokens, full audit log.

s2.a: Fully. All data-subject rights are implemented (access, correction, deletion, portability). We have a DPO and a complete processing register.

s3.a: Hashed with BCrypt (cost 12), never stored in plaintext. Email reset links use SHA-256 hashed tokens and rate limiting on auth endpoints.

s4.a: Coming soon for Professional and Enterprise plans — both authenticator app and SMS.

b1.a: Debit/credit cards, DIAS and bank transfer for annual subscriptions (with 15% discount). Invoices include your VAT details.

b2.a: Yes, anytime. Upgrades apply immediately, downgrades from the next billing cycle.

b3.a: Yes. Every charge comes with an electronic invoice to your agency email with all VAT details.

i1.q: Do you integrate with insurance carriers?
i1.a: Yes. Per-agency, per-carrier Bridges over REST API, FTP, email parsing or webhook. Automatic policy and update exchange.

i2.a: Yes. RF code per contract, payment tracking and auto contract delivery the moment your office receives confirmation.

i3.q: Do you have a public API?
i3.a: Yes. Full REST API with tokens and scopes. Connect accounting suites, mobile apps or third-party tools.

i4.q: Do you integrate with accounting systems?
i4.a: Direct connectors for the most common Greek accounting systems (BlueByte and others), XML/CSV export for the rest. Auto journal entries from every financial movement.

u1.a: In-app chat, email at support@kalypsis.gr and phone for Enterprise. Average response under 2 hours on business days.

u2.a: Yes. Free 2-hour online training for your agency, detailed Greek manuals, video tutorials and a monthly webinar.

u3.a: Monday through Friday, 09:00–18:00 EET. Enterprise plans include 24/7 support for critical issues.

u4.a: New features every week, zero downtime and no action required from you. All updates and improvements are included in your subscription.

auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Contact your agency.

common.exportColumnsHelp: Choose which columns are included in CSV, Excel, PDF and print.

maintenance.title: Welcome {{name}}. Your platform is being prepared.
maintenance.body: Your account has been created and your data is fully preserved. We'll email you the moment your environment goes live.
maintenance.dataSafe: Your data is safe and unchanged.

siteMaintenance.title: Maintenance in progress.
siteMaintenance.body: The platform is temporarily unavailable. We'll be back in a few minutes. Thanks for your patience.

onboarding.doneBody: Your agency is set up. Explore everything from the sidebar and change settings anytime under Agency Settings.

BackOffice.name: BackOffice
BackOffice.body: Agency ledger: cashier, payments, commissions, over-commissions, accounting exports, KEPYO, magnetic imports, legacy back-office bridges.

FrontOffice.name: FrontOffice
FrontOffice.body: Multi-carrier quoting, saved risk profiles, applications & issuance, Print-Pay, Pay-Print, Piggy Bank, Carrier Orders.

Crm.name: CRM & Customer Portal
Crm.body: Customer portal, mobile app, requests, appointments, marketing campaigns, bulk Email/SMS/Viber.

Intelligence.name: Reports & Intelligence
Intelligence.body: Production goals, report builder, audit logs, AI churn prediction, AI PDF extraction, communication drafting, workflows.

Integrations.name: Integrations & Compliance
Integrations.body: myDATA, online payments (e-pos, ePay, DIAS, Viva), telephony with recording, mailbox sync, branches, B2B portal.

dashboard.title: Welcome to Kalypsis!

policies.body: All policies. Click a row to see details, or '+' to create a new one.

claims.title: Claims

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.body: Collect premiums from customers — balances update automatically.

gl.title: General Ledger

bell.title: Notifications
bell.body: New claims, overdue items, messages. Click the bell to see them.

profile.title: Profile & Logout
profile.body: Log out from here. The profile page also has the restart-this-tour button if you need it again.

dashboard.title: Welcome!

search.title: Search
search.body: Type name, tax ID, email or phone to find a customer fast — results filter as you type.

new.title: New customer
new.body: Click here to register a new natural person or company. Fill the basics and the system auto-generates a customer code.

table.title: Customer list
table.body: Each row is one customer. Click any row to open the full profile (policies, requests, GDPR, documents, communication history).

export.title: Export to Excel
export.body: Download all customers as CSV — useful for backups and accountant bulk-edits.

search.title: Policy filters
search.body: Combine text search, status and policy type to drill down. Search inspects policy number, carrier and customer name.

new.title: New policy
new.body: Starts the 4-step wizard: customer → carrier/product → risk → review & issue. Premium and commission are computed automatically.

row.title: Click a row
row.body: Each row opens a detail drawer with 8 tabs: Summary, Financials, Parties, Renewal, Delivery, Endorsements, Claims, Receipts.

status.title: Status colors
status.body: Green = Active · Orange = Expiring soon · Grey = Expired · Red = Cancelled. Filter to focus on what needs attention.

new.title: New claim
new.body: File a new claim notice. Pick the policy, incident date and description. The claim becomes available for USAE transmission.

row.title: Click a row
row.body: Open the detail drawer — provisions, victims, indemnities, garage links, USAE submissions.

status.title: Claim workflow
status.body: Reported → Investigating → Approved → Settled → Closed. Each transition is timestamped in the audit log.

new.title: New producer
new.body: Add a new production partner. Set hierarchy level and commission group — over-commissions are computed automatically.

row.title: Producer drawer
row.body: Click a row to see performance grade (A-F), renewal rate, claim ratio, YTD growth, total commissions.

new.title: New receipt
new.body: Record a premium receipt. Pick customer and policy — the amount auto-allocates against the policy balance.

row.title: Reprint & void
row.body: Click a row to reprint the receipt or void a mistaken entry (if the period isn't locked).

new.title: New commission run
new.body: Run commission calculation. Pick month/year and filters (carrier, producer). Draft lines are produced for review before finalisation.

row.title: Open a run
row.body: View all commission lines, do manual overrides, and finalise to post producer ledger movements.

search.title: Find a tool
search.body: Don't remember which section something lives in? Type e.g. "commissions" or "myDATA" — every tool is searchable.

categories.title: Categories
categories.body: Tools are grouped by function — Production, Financials, Accounting, CRM, etc. Click any card to open the page.

policyDetail.specialCommissionHelp: Leave blank to use the rule. Fill only to override manually.
policyDetail.name: Name
policyDetail.renewalInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. "10% discount agreed due to driving record."
